metadata.description: Personal marketplace for lian.trinh's Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: lian-qa-plugin
plugins.description: AI-driven QA automation plugin — spec-first workflow: scaffold or scan a project (/init), write specs from Notion/Confluence/Jira or CucumberStudio (/spec, /do-cucumber-task), scan app source for real locators and business logic (/scan-source), manage plugin config (/rename, /add-mcp). Phase 1 of a larger test-generation pipeline.
